mapper.sql: id, source_text, target_text, source_lang, target_lang, translator_type, create_time
mapper.select:
select
from t_translation_history order by create_time desc, id desc
mapper.delete: delete from t_translation_history where id not in (select id from t_translation_history order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{maxCount,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.insert: insert into t_translation_history (source_text, target_text, source_lang, target_lang, translator_type, create_time) values (#{sourceText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceLang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetLang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{translatorType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
